chat.empty_subtitle: Your AI system control agent. Type, speak, or gesture — I'm ready.

confirm.title: Confirmation Required
confirm.body: The following actions require your approval before execution. Uncheck any you don't want to run — the rest will be skipped.

rollback.title: Undo Last Action?
rollback.body: This will revert your entire disk state to the snapshot taken just before the last action ran — including any other changes made since then, not just what the action did. This cannot be undone.
rollback.banner: A snapshot was taken before the last action.

settings.title: Settings
settings.light_mode_desc: Switch between dark and light themes
settings.root_access_desc: Allow actions that require superuser privileges
settings.auto_snapshot_desc: Create system snapshot before destructive actions
settings.dry_run_desc: Plan and log actions without changing the OS, files, or processes
settings.gaze_tracking_desc: Adds a coarse on-device screen-region gaze signal (left/right/up/down/center) as a third fusion input alongside voice and gesture. Only a region label and confidence ever leave the device — never camera frames or face landmarks. Off by default.
settings.gaze_tracking_enabled_desc: Loads MediaPipe's FaceLandmarker to estimate a coarse gaze region
settings.gesture_cursor_warning: This drives your actual OS mouse cursor from webcam hand tracking. Off by default — an open palm or the engine's stop button always exits cursor mode immediately.
settings.gesture_cursor_enabled_desc: Move and click the real cursor by pointing and pinching
settings.gesture_cursor_sensitivity_desc: Scales how far the cursor moves per unit of hand motion
settings.gesture_cursor_blend_desc: How much predicted (vs. current) hand position feeds the cursor — 0 is current-only, 1 is fully predicted
settings.gesture_calibration_desc: Learns your pinch distance and thumb-extension style over time from normal usage — no new model, just a bounded on-device adjustment stored only in this browser.
settings.gesture_calibration_enabled_desc: Personalize pinch/thumb thresholds from implicit usage signals
settings.voice_calibration_desc: Learns accent/microphone-specific wake-word variants from repeated near-miss transcripts — stored only in a local file on this device, no audio is ever saved.
settings.voice_calibration_enabled_desc: Recognize confirmed wake-word variants alongside the default phrase
settings.gesture_workflows_desc: Bind a gesture to a multi-step goal of your own choosing — the gesture starts that goal instead of its usual action. Off by default since this grants a gesture a new capability.
settings.gesture_workflows_goal_placeholder: e.g. back up today's screenshots and summarize the day
settings.self_healing_desc: Watches CPU/memory/disk and plans a fix when one crosses its threshold. Low-risk, reversible fixes run automatically; anything riskier is proposed below for you to approve or deny. Off by default.
settings.self_healing_tier_desc: Plans at or below this tier run without asking; anything higher (or irreversible) is always proposed for approval
settings.ollama_model_desc: Model tag to use with Ollama
settings.reset_desc: Clear local settings and restore default configuration
settings.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?
